description: Prefix meN-: the nasal assimilates to the following consonant's place (mem before labials, men before coronals, meng before dorsals/vowels).
mechanism: PhonologicalRule: nasal place = following C place (archiphoneme N)

description: Prefix peN-: the nasal assimilates to the following consonant's place (pem before labials, pen before coronals, peng before dorsals/vowels).
mechanism: PhonologicalRule: nasal place = following C place (archiphoneme N)
